description: Audio sync and scene timing -- duration distribution algorithm per Section 8.7: audio-driven (T = audio_duration, scenes share proportionally), explicit (T = sum of scene durations + transition overlaps), or combined (explicit durations with audio mismatch warning). Timestamp-based scene boundary alignment to narration cues. Covers C-07 (audio synchronization) and TC-13 (audio duration drives total video length).
notes: Tier 3 engine integration. Spec defines scene-timing.ts with three timing modes (explicit, audio_proportional, audio_cue), frame-level scene resolution via FrameClock, and per-frame lookup with unified dip_to_black opacity formula. 50 acceptance criteria, 22 design decisions.
